formulas.name: 1. Five Year Plan Formula
formulas.formula: GDP Growth Rate = (Final Year GDP - Initial Year GDP) / Initial Year GDP × 100
formulas.notes: To calculate the growth rate of GDP over a five-year plan period

formulas.name: 2. Human Development Index (HDI) Formula
formulas.formula: HDI = (Life Expectancy Index × Education Index × Income Index) / 3
formulas.variables: Life Expectancy Index, Education Index, Income Index
formulas.notes: To measure the overall well-being of a country

formulas.name: 3. Poverty Line Formula
formulas.formula: Poverty Line = Minimum Consumption Expenditure required to meet the basic needs
formulas.notes: To determine the poverty line in a country

formulas.name: 4. Unemployment Rate Formula
formulas.formula: Unemployment Rate = (Number of Unemployed / Labour Force) × 100
formulas.notes: To calculate the unemployment rate in a country

formulas.name: 5. Inflation Rate Formula
formulas.formula: Inflation Rate = (Current Year Price Index - Previous Year Price Index) / Previous Year Price Index × 100
formulas.variables: Current Year Price Index, Previous Year Price Index
formulas.notes: To calculate the inflation rate over a period of time

formulas.name: 6. National Income Formula
formulas.formula: National Income = GDP - Depreciation + Net Factor Income from Abroad
formulas.variables: GDP, Depreciation, Net Factor Income from Abroad
formulas.notes: To calculate the national income of a country

formulas.name: 7. Per Capita Income Formula
formulas.formula: Per Capita Income = National Income / Population
formulas.notes: To calculate the average income of a person in a country

formulas.name: 8. Dependency Ratio Formula
formulas.formula: Dependency Ratio = (Population aged 0-14 and 65+ / Working-age population) × 100
formulas.variables: Population aged 0-14, Population aged 65+, Working-age population
formulas.notes: To calculate the proportion of dependents in a population

formulas.name: 9. Investment Multiplier Formula
formulas.notes: To calculate the effect of an increase in investment on national income

formulas.name: 10. Fiscal Deficit Formula
formulas.formula: Fiscal Deficit = Total Expenditure - Total Revenue
formulas.notes: To calculate the fiscal deficit of a government
